item.title: Version 0.1.87 - Ordinal list fix
item.description:
List fix.

  • Spoken "first... second... third..." lists format as numbered lists again.

item.title: Version 0.1.86 - New cleanup model (Gemma 4)
item.description:
New cleanup model: Gemma 4.

  • AI cleanup is now a generation newer and faster — most cleanups finish in about 0.2 seconds.
  • One-time ~3.5 GB model download on first use after updating; dictation works normally while it downloads.

item.title: Version 0.1.85 - Smarter list detection
item.description:
Smarter list detection.

  • Number words inside a list item no longer split it into extra items.
  • Unannounced spoken lists stay as clean prose; announce one ("three points: one...") for numbered formatting.

item.title: Version 0.1.84 - List formatting fixes
item.description:
List formatting fixes from field testing.

  • A number word inside a list item no longer splits the item or renumbers the list.
  • List lead-ins no longer end with doubled punctuation.

item.title: Version 0.1.83 - Instant cleanup and the Speed/Polish dial
item.description:
Instant-feeling cleanup and a Speed/Polish dial.

  • AI cleanup now finishes in about a third of a second — it prepares while you speak.
  • New in Settings: Speed (instant paste) or Polish (AI formatting) per app type.
  • If Accessibility isn't granted, your text stays on the clipboard with clear instructions instead of disappearing.

item.title: Version 0.1.82 - Smarter cleanup
item.description:
Smarter, faster dictation cleanup.

  • On-device cleanup finishes in about a second and formats consistently.
  • The model now knows whether you're dictating into chat, email, or an AI prompt.
  • Spoken times with teen minutes ("eleven fifteen") now format correctly.
  • Tip: set the cleanup timeout to 2.0s in Settings for best results.

item.title: Version 0.1.81 - Memory fix
item.description:
Memory stays flat.

  • Fixes unbounded memory growth while the optional LLM cleanup model is loaded (previously could reach tens of GB over a day of use).
  • LLM cleanup generations now stop correctly and format deterministically.

item.title: Version 0.1.80 - No more mid-sentence line breaks
item.description:
Cleaner paragraphs.

  • A thinking pause inside a sentence no longer becomes a paragraph break. Breaks happen only between complete sentences separated by a clear pause.

item.title: Version 0.1.79 - Microphone left clean for other apps
item.description:
Your voice stays full in other apps.

  • YEP no longer routes the system microphone through voice processing, so calls and recordings sound normal while YEP is running. Builds on 0.1.78's system-audio ducking fix.

item.title: Version 0.1.78 - No more audio ducking
item.description:
Other audio stays at full volume.

  • YEP no longer ducks your music, calls, or video while the microphone is live. Dictation keeps echo cancellation and automatic gain.

item.title: Version 0.1.77 - Smarter formatting and reachable updates
item.description:
Sharper formatting and easier updates.

  • Paragraph breaks adapt to your speaking rhythm instead of a fixed pause.
  • Recognizes more list lead-ins like "here are three things" and "a couple of things", and lists up to ten items.
  • Formats currency ($5, $5 million) and groups phone numbers (555-123-4567).
  • Optional on-device cleanup uses pause cues and the text around your cursor, on a faster Gemma 3 model.
  • "Check for Updates" is now in the app menu and Settings, not just the menu-bar icon.

item.title: Version 0.1.76 - Time and date cleanup
item.description:
Cleaner spoken times and dates.

  • Turns clear clock-time phrases like "let's meet at two thirty" into "Let's meet at 2:30".
  • Supports AM/PM variants such as "two oh five p m".
  • Adds conservative month/day/year cleanup, while avoiding generic phrases like "I may go tomorrow".

item.title: Version 0.1.75 - Mid-sentence input context
item.description:
Better mid-sentence dictation.

  • Adds a Continue mid-sentence cleanup option that reads a short local prefix from the focused text field.
  • Uses that local input context to avoid unnecessary capitalization when dictating into the middle of a sentence.
  • Updates privacy wording to describe focused-input context without implying broad screen reading.

item.title: Version 0.1.74 - Correction and update feed polish
item.description:
Cleaner course corrections and first hosted update feed.

  • Improves local self-correction cleanup for phrases like "let's meet at 330, no I mean 230".
  • Preserves normal uses of words like "actually" when they are not corrections.
  • Points Sparkle at the hosted update feed so future builds can update remotely.
